description: Cached, off-main image view (ActionUICachedImage add-on) backed by AsyncImageCache's ImageStore. Fetches/decodes/downscales off the main thread and serves from a two-tier memory + on-disk cache; the natural pixel size is known up front so layout reserves the exact box with no reflow on hydration. macOS/iOS/visionOS. Driven by the element value or the url property.

url.description: Web, file, or data URL of the image (seed for the element value). Nil or invalid shows the placeholder

intrinsicSize.description: The source's natural size, if known ahead of load; reserves the exact box up front so the image hydrates with zero reflow

contentMode.description: How the image fills the reserved box. Default fill

maxPixelWidth.description: Cap the decoded width in pixels (downscaled off-main) to bound memory for large sources; omit for natural resolution

value.description: Current image URL string; write a new URL to load a different image
